addPostcodeForShipping: Add your postcode for shipping costs
checkoutSlow: Checkout is taking longer than expected
confirmDeliveryAvailability: Enter your address to confirm delivery availability
deliveryUnavailable: Delivery isn't available to your area
emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
fulfillmentMethod: How would you like your order?
nearDeliveryZone: You're just outside the delivery area
noProducts: No products available at the moment.
orderProcessing: Your order is being processed — you'll receive a confirmation shortly.
paymentDeclined: Your payment was declined. Try a different payment method or contact your bank.
paymentFormLoadFailed: Payment form failed to load. Please try again.
paymentInitFailed: Payment setup failed. Please try again.
paymentProcessing: Your payment is being processed. You'll receive confirmation shortly.
phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number
privacyDataCollectedBody: We collect information you provide when placing an order: your name, email address, phone number, delivery address, and payment details. We also collect technical data such as your IP address and browser type.
privacyHowWeUseBody: We use your data to process and deliver your orders, communicate about your order status, improve our services, and comply with legal obligations. We do not use your data for marketing without your consent.
privacyNotice: We use your details to process and deliver your order.
privacyPolicyIntro: This privacy policy explains how %1$s collects, uses, and protects your personal data when you use our online ordering platform.
privacyRightsBody: Under the GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You may also object to processing or request data portability. To exercise these rights, contact us using the details below.
privacySharingBody: We share your data only with parties necessary to fulfill your order: payment processors, delivery partners, and the restaurant preparing your food. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
scheduling: When would you like your order?
showingItemsFor: Showing items available for delivery to %1$s
slotUnavailable: This time slot is no longer available
storageUnavailable: Your browser doesn't support saving form progress. Please complete checkout in one session.
stripeLoadFailed: Failed to load payment form. Please check your connection.
termsCancellationBody: Once an order has been confirmed and preparation has begun, it cannot be cancelled. If there is an issue with your order, please contact us and we will work to resolve it.
termsDeliveryBody: Delivery times are estimates and may vary. We are not liable for delays caused by circumstances beyond our control. For pickup orders, please collect your order at the indicated time and location.
termsIntro: These terms and conditions apply to all orders placed through the %1$s online ordering platform.
termsLiabilityBody: We take reasonable care to ensure the accuracy of product descriptions and allergen information. However, we are not liable for any adverse reactions. Please inform us of any allergies when placing your order.
termsOrdersBody: By placing an order, you agree to these terms. All orders are subject to availability and confirmation. We reserve the right to refuse any order.
termsPricingBody: All prices are displayed in the applicable currency and include VAT where required. Payment is processed securely at the time of ordering. We accept the payment methods shown at checkout.
toastAddToCartFailed: Failed to add to cart. Please try again.
toastCartUpdateFailed: Failed to update cart. Please try again.
unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
